channel.title: Tempered Fables
channel.itunes:author: Norman Chella
channel.description: The Tempered Fables is a collection of fictional short stories. Their purpose is to leave you with a lesson to remember. The genres range from fantasy to comedy, horror, and romance. This podcast was created by Norman Chella, under the pen name N.T. Cloever. For more info, visit: https://temperedfables.com/

item.itunes:title: EP 36: Dancing in the Dark
item.title: EP 36: Dancing in the Dark
item.itunes:summary: A soldier and his wife are on a video call before the inevitable. Genres: Family, Loss.
item.content:encoded:
In this episode... A soldier and his wife are on a video call before the inevitable.
The genres are... Family. Loss.
Warnings... there are no warnings this time, but a tip: watch out for the time.

item.itunes:title: EP 35: My Favourite Song
item.title: EP 35: My Favourite Song
item.itunes:summary: She was modelling for her friend's next art piece. He gets distracted. Genre: Romance.
item.content:encoded:
In this episode... She was modelling for her friend's next art piece. He gets distracted.
Genres include: Romance.
No warnings this time! Maaaaybe it'll get slightly heated, shall we say.

item.itunes:title: EP 34: Painters Of Our Lives
item.title: EP 34: Painters Of Our Lives
item.itunes:summary: A bartender observes his painter friend as he finds his muse and tries to paint her. Genres: Life, Romance, Art.
item.content:encoded:
In this episode... A bartender observes his painter friend, as he finds his muse and tries to paint her.
Genres include: Life, Romance, Art.

item.itunes:title: EP 33: The Architect Of Life
item.title: EP 33: The Architect Of Life
item.itunes:summary: The Architect of Life takes you on a tour throughout the Afterlife. Genres: Life, Fiction.
item.content:encoded:
In this story... The Architect of Life takes you on a tour throughout the Afterlife.
Genres: Life, Fiction.
There are no warnings this time.

item.itunes:title: Reviewing 2019: Favourite Stories, Lore, And The Break (Cloever's Journal)
item.title: Reviewing 2019: Favourite Stories, Lore, And The Break (Cloever's Journal)
item.itunes:summary: A look back at Season 2 and 3, favourite stories, the lore, and the big break in between — plus updates for next season.
item.content:encoded:
In this Cloever's Journal, I review 2019 — taking a look at Season 2 and 3, my favourite stories, and the big break in between. Plus, updates for next season.
PSA: Tempered Fables will be taking a month break to write the next batch of stories.
